---
title: Rôti de palette aux oignons et à l’érable à la mijoteuse

categories:
  - Plats principaux
  - Boeuf
  - Mijoteuse
---

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-toolbar">
<div class="recipe-toolbar-main">
<a href="../ajouter_recette/?yaml=%2Frecettes%2Frepas%2Froti-palette-oignons-erable-mijoteuse.yaml" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">✏️ Modifier</a>
<a href="../ajouter_recette/?yaml=%2Frecettes%2Frepas%2Froti-palette-oignons-erable-mijoteuse.yaml&quick=comment" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">💬 + Commentaire</a>
</div>
<div class="recipe-toolbar-actions">
<button id="recipe-cart-toggle" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success btn-sm">🛒 Mettre au panier</button>
<button id="recipe-reading-mode" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">🍳 Mode cuisine</button>
</div>
</div>
<div class="recipe-facts-grid"><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Source</span><strong><a href="https://www.lesrecettesdecaty.com/fr/recettes/plats-principaux/boeuf/roti-de-palette-aux-oignons-et-a-lerable-a-la-mijoteuse/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">lesrecettesdecaty.com</a></strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Se congèle</span><strong>Oui</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps préparation</span><strong>20 min</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps cuisson</span><strong>480 min</strong></div></div>

```

```{=html}
<script id="recipe-cart-data" type="application/json">{"id":"/recettes/repas/roti-palette-oignons-erable-mijoteuse.qmd","title":"Rôti de palette aux oignons et à l’érable à la mijoteuse","url":"/recettes/repas/roti-palette-oignons-erable-mijoteuse.qmd","portions_base":6,"portions_target":6,"ingredients":[{"nom":"Poudre d'oignon","uni":"ml","qte":30,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Poudre d'ail","uni":"ml","qte":5,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Moutarde de Dijon","uni":"ml","qte":30,"rangee":"Conserves et sauces"},{"nom":"Thym frais haché","uni":"ml","qte":15,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Sel","uni":"au gout","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Poivre","uni":"au gout","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Rôti de palette de boeuf sans os","uni":"unité","qte":1,"rangee":"Viandes et substituts"},{"nom":"Huile d'olive","uni":"ml","qte":15,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Bouillon de boeuf","uni":"tasse","qte":0.75,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Sirop d'érable","uni":"tasse","qte":0.33,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Oignon","uni":"unité","qte":1,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Carotte nantaise","uni":"unité","qte":4,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Pomme de terre grelot","uni":"unité","qte":8,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Rutabaga","uni":"unité","qte":0.5,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"}]}</script>
<script src="/includes/recipe-cart.js"></script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-meta-badges"><span class="recipe-meta-badge">Difficulté: Facile</span><span class="recipe-meta-badge">Coût: $$</span></div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-servings-control"><label for="servings-input" class="form-label mb-1">Ajuster les portions</label><div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-2"><input id="servings-input" class="form-control form-control-sm" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="6" style="max-width: 110px;"><button id="servings-reset" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" type="button">Réinitialiser</button><span class="text-muted small">Base: 6</span></div><div class="recipe-measure-mode"><span class="form-label mb-1 d-block">Affichage des quantités</span><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Mode de mesure"><button id="measure-mode-default" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="default">Par défaut</button><button id="measure-mode-volume" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="volume">Volume</button><button id="measure-mode-mass" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="mass">Masse</button></div><div class="recipe-measure-submodes mt-2"><div id="volume-submodes" class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Format volume"><button id="volume-unit-kitchen" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">Cuillères / tasse</button><button id="volume-unit-ml" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">mL</button></div><div id="mass-submodes" class="btn-group btn-group-sm ms-2" role="group" aria-label="Format masse"><button id="mass-unit-g" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">g</button><button id="mass-unit-lbs" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">lbs</button></div></div><span id="measure-mode-help" class="text-muted small d-block mt-1">Les quantités converties sont affichées dans une couleur différente.</span></div></div>
```

```{=html}
<section class="recipe-nutrition-section">
<h2>Valeurs nutritives</h2>
<div class="recipe-nutrition-block"><div class="recipe-nutrition-cards"><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Calories</span><strong>75 kcal</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Protéines</span><strong>0,5 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Glucides</span><strong>13,2 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Lipides</span><strong>2,6 g</strong></div></div><details class="recipe-nutrition-details"><summary class="recipe-nutrition-toggle">Afficher le détail complet</summary><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Estimations basées sur les ingrédients saisis. Portions de base: 6.</p><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Sources nutrition (ingrédients calculés): cnf_2015: 4.</p><table class="recipe-nutrition-table table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Nutriment</th><th>Par recette</th><th>Par portion</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><th scope="row">Calories</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="448.859" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">449 kcal</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="448.859" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">75 kcal</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Protéines</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="2.98" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">3 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="2.98" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,5 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Lipides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="15.65" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">15,7 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="15.65" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">2,6 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Gras saturés</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="2.230992" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">2,2 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="2.230992" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,4 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Glucides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="79.31196" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">79,3 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="79.31196" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">13,2 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sucres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="28.49196" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">28,5 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="28.49196" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">4,7 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fibres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="2.83" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">2,8 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="2.83" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,5 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sodium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="486.7475" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">487 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="486.7475" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">81 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Potassium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="216.1953" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">216 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="216.1953" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">36 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Calcium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="65.92825" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">66 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="65.92825" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">11 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fer</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.8803575" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,9 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.8803575" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,1 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Magnésium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="27.5945" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">28 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="27.5945" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">5 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Zinc</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.72478" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,7 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.72478" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,1 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sélénium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="10.9" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">10,9 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="10.9" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">1,8 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine C</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="8.14" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">8,1 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="8.14" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">1,4 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine B12</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine A (EAR)</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine D</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr></tbody></table><details class="recipe-nutrition-missing"><summary>Ingrédients non comptabilisés (10)</summary><ul><li><code>Poudre d'oignon</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Poudre d'ail</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Thym frais haché</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Sel</code> (unite_non_calculable)</li><li><code>Poivre</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Rôti de palette de boeuf sans os</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Bouillon de boeuf</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Carotte nantaise</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Pomme de terre grelot</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Rutabaga</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li></ul></details></details></div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const key='recipe_reading_mode';
let wakeLock=null;
const apply=(on)=>{document.body.classList.toggle('reading-mode', on);};
const requestWake=async()=>{try{if('wakeLock' in navigator){wakeLock=await navigator.wakeLock.request('screen');}}catch(e){}};
const releaseWake=async()=>{try{if(wakeLock){await wakeLock.release(); wakeLock=null;}}catch(e){}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ()=>{
const btn=document.getElementById('recipe-reading-mode');
const saved=localStorage.getItem(key)==='1'; apply(saved); if(saved) requestWake();
if(!btn) return;
const refresh=()=>{btn.classList.toggle('active', document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'));}; refresh();
btn.addEventListener('click', async()=>{const next=!document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'); apply(next); localStorage.setItem(key, next?'1':'0'); refresh(); if(next){await requestWake();} else {await releaseWake();}});
});
})();</script>
```

## Ingrédients

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-grocery-actions">
<button id="copy-grocery-list" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">📋 Générer la liste d'épicerie</button>
<button id="reset-recipe-checks" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">↺ Réinitialiser les cases</button>
<span id="grocery-copy-feedback" class="text-muted small"></span>
</div>
```

### Préparation

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poudre d'oignon" data-base-ingredient-name="Poudre d'oignon" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-default-qty="30" data-default-unit="ml" data-display-default-unit="ml" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="30" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="30">30</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre d'oignon</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poudre d'ail" data-base-ingredient-name="Poudre d'ail" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-default-qty="5" data-default-unit="ml" data-display-default-unit="ml" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="5">5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre d'ail</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="Moutarde de Dijon" data-base-ingredient-name="Moutarde de Dijon" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-default-qty="30" data-default-unit="ml" data-display-default-unit="ml" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="30" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="30">30</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Moutarde de Dijon</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Thym frais haché" data-base-ingredient-name="Thym frais haché" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-default-qty="15" data-default-unit="ml" data-display-default-unit="ml" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="15">15</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Thym frais haché</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-base-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="au gout" data-default-qty="1" data-default-unit="au gout" data-display-default-unit="au gout" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au gout</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poivre" data-base-ingredient-name="Poivre" data-ingredient-unit="au gout" data-default-qty="1" data-default-unit="au gout" data-display-default-unit="au gout" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au gout</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poivre</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="Rôti de palette de boeuf sans os" data-base-ingredient-name="Rôti de palette de boeuf sans os" data-ingredient-unit="" data-default-qty="1" data-default-unit="unité" data-display-default-unit="" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">rôti de palette de boeuf sans os</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Huile d'olive" data-base-ingredient-name="Huile d'olive" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-default-qty="15" data-default-unit="ml" data-display-default-unit="ml" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="13.725" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="derived" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="15">15</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Huile d'olive</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Bouillon de boeuf" data-base-ingredient-name="Bouillon de boeuf" data-ingredient-unit="tasses" data-default-qty="0.75" data-default-unit="tasse" data-display-default-unit="tasses" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="187.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.75">0.75</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasses</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Bouillon de boeuf</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sirop d'érable" data-base-ingredient-name="Sirop d'érable" data-ingredient-unit="tasses" data-default-qty="0.33" data-default-unit="tasse" data-display-default-unit="tasses" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="108.8175" data-base-volume-ml="82.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="derived" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.33">0.33</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasses</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sirop d'érable</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Oignon" data-base-ingredient-name="Oignon" data-ingredient-unit="" data-default-qty="1" data-default-unit="unité" data-display-default-unit="" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">oignon</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Carotte nantaise" data-base-ingredient-name="Carotte nantaise" data-ingredient-unit="" data-default-qty="4" data-default-unit="unité" data-display-default-unit="" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="4">4</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">carottes nantaises</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Pomme de terre grelot" data-base-ingredient-name="Pomme de terre grelot" data-ingredient-unit="" data-default-qty="8" data-default-unit="unité" data-display-default-unit="" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="8">8</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">pommes de terre grelots</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Rutabaga" data-base-ingredient-name="Rutabaga" data-ingredient-unit="" data-default-qty="0.5" data-default-unit="unité" data-display-default-unit="" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.5">0.5</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">rutabagas</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

## Équipements

### Préparation

- Bol
- Poêle
- Assiette
- Mijoteuse

## Préparation

### Préparation

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poudre d'oignon" data-base-ingredient-name="Poudre d'oignon" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-default-qty="30" data-default-unit="ml" data-display-default-unit="ml" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="30" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="30">30</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre d'oignon</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poudre d'ail" data-base-ingredient-name="Poudre d'ail" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-default-qty="5" data-default-unit="ml" data-display-default-unit="ml" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="5">5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre d'ail</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="Moutarde de Dijon" data-base-ingredient-name="Moutarde de Dijon" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-default-qty="30" data-default-unit="ml" data-display-default-unit="ml" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="30" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="30">30</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Moutarde de Dijon</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Thym frais haché" data-base-ingredient-name="Thym frais haché" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-default-qty="15" data-default-unit="ml" data-display-default-unit="ml" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="15">15</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Thym frais haché</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-base-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="au gout" data-default-qty="1" data-default-unit="au gout" data-display-default-unit="au gout" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au gout</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poivre" data-base-ingredient-name="Poivre" data-ingredient-unit="au gout" data-default-qty="1" data-default-unit="au gout" data-display-default-unit="au gout" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au gout</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poivre</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Dans un bol, mélanger la poudre d’oignon avec la poudre d’ail, la moutarde et le thym. Saler et poivrer.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="Rôti de palette de boeuf sans os" data-base-ingredient-name="Rôti de palette de boeuf sans os" data-ingredient-unit="" data-default-qty="1" data-default-unit="unité" data-display-default-unit="" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">rôti de palette de boeuf sans os</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Retirer l’excédent de gras du rôti de palette.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Huile d'olive" data-base-ingredient-name="Huile d'olive" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-default-qty="15" data-default-unit="ml" data-display-default-unit="ml" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="13.725" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="derived" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="15">15</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Huile d'olive</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 3</span></label></div><p>Dans une poêle, chauffer l’huile à feu moyen. Saisir le rôti de palette de 1 à 2 minutes de chaque côté.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="120">⏱️ 2 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 4</span></label></div><p>Transférer le rôti dans une assiette. Badigeonner les deux côtés du rôti avec la préparation à la moutarde.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Bouillon de boeuf" data-base-ingredient-name="Bouillon de boeuf" data-ingredient-unit="tasses" data-default-qty="0.75" data-default-unit="tasse" data-display-default-unit="tasses" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="187.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.75">0.75</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasses</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Bouillon de boeuf</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sirop d'érable" data-base-ingredient-name="Sirop d'érable" data-ingredient-unit="tasses" data-default-qty="0.33" data-default-unit="tasse" data-display-default-unit="tasses" data-default-kind="volume" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="108.8175" data-base-volume-ml="82.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-mass-source="derived" data-volume-source="explicit" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.33">0.33</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasses</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sirop d'érable</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Oignon" data-base-ingredient-name="Oignon" data-ingredient-unit="" data-default-qty="1" data-default-unit="unité" data-display-default-unit="" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">oignon</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Carotte nantaise" data-base-ingredient-name="Carotte nantaise" data-ingredient-unit="" data-default-qty="4" data-default-unit="unité" data-display-default-unit="" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="4">4</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">carottes nantaises</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Pomme de terre grelot" data-base-ingredient-name="Pomme de terre grelot" data-ingredient-unit="" data-default-qty="8" data-default-unit="unité" data-display-default-unit="" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="8">8</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">pommes de terre grelots</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Rutabaga" data-base-ingredient-name="Rutabaga" data-ingredient-unit="" data-default-qty="0.5" data-default-unit="unité" data-display-default-unit="" data-default-kind="other" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-mass-source="none" data-volume-source="none" data-default-mode="default"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.5">0.5</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">rutabagas</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 5</span></label></div><p>Déposer le rôti dans la mijoteuse. Ajouter le bouillon, le sirop d’érable et les légumes.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 6</span></label></div><p>Couvrir et cuire de 8 à 9 heures à faible intensité, jusqu’à ce que la viande se défasse facilement à la fourchette.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="32400">⏱️ 9 h</button></div></div></article>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){const input=document.getElementById('servings-input');const reset=document.getElementById('servings-reset');const btnDefault=document.getElementById('measure-mode-default');const btnVolume=document.getElementById('measure-mode-volume');const btnMass=document.getElementById('measure-mode-mass');const btnVolKitchen=document.getElementById('volume-unit-kitchen');const btnVolMl=document.getElementById('volume-unit-ml');const btnMassG=document.getElementById('mass-unit-g');const btnMassLbs=document.getElementById('mass-unit-lbs');const volumeSubmodes=document.getElementById('volume-submodes');const massSubmodes=document.getElementById('mass-submodes');const measureHelp=document.getElementById('measure-mode-help');const hasScaler=!!input;const base=6;const modeKey='recipe_measure_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const volumeUnitKey='recipe_volume_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const massUnitKey='recipe_mass_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const savedMode=localStorage.getItem(modeKey);let mode=(savedMode==='mass'||savedMode==='volume'||savedMode==='default')?savedMode:'default';let volumeUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(volumeUnitKey)==='ml')?'ml':'kitchen';let massUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(massUnitKey)==='lbs')?'lbs':'g';const format=(n)=>{const r=Math.round(n*100)/100; return (Math.abs(r-Math.round(r))<1e-9)?String(Math.round(r)):String(r).replace('.',',');};const formatFraction=(n)=>{const whole=Math.floor(n+1e-9); const frac=n-whole; const choices=[[0.25,'1/4'],[1/3,'1/3'],[0.5,'1/2'],[2/3,'2/3'],[0.75,'3/4']]; let hit=''; for(const [v,label] of choices){ if(Math.abs(frac-v)<0.04){ hit=label; break; } } if(!hit) return null; if(whole<1) return hit; return `${whole} ${hit}`;};const normalize=(u)=>String(u||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,' ').trim();const isCountUnit=(u)=>{const n=normalize(u); return n==='unite'||n==='unites'||n==='unit'||n==='units';};const isTextualCountDisplayUnit=(u)=>['gousse','gousses','branche','branches','feuille','feuilles','boite','boites','conserve','conserves','tranche','tranches','paquet','paquets','bloc','blocs'].includes(normalize(u));const lowercaseInitial=(txt)=>{const raw=String(txt||'').trim(); if(!raw) return raw; const first=raw.charAt(0); if(!/[A-ZÀ-ÖÙ-Ý]/.test(first)) return raw; if(raw.length>1&&/[A-ZÀ-ÖÙ-Ý]{2}/.test(raw.slice(0,2))) return raw; return first.toLowerCase()+raw.slice(1);};const displayUnit=(u)=>isCountUnit(u)?'':String(u||'').trim();const pluralizeMeasureUnit=(unit,qty)=>{const raw=String(unit||'').trim(); if(isCountUnit(raw)) return ''; const q=Number(qty); const singular=!Number.isFinite(q)||Math.abs(q-1)<1e-9; const n=normalize(raw); if(n==='tasse'||n==='tasses') return singular?'tasse':'tasses'; if(n==='once'||n==='onces'||n==='oz') return singular?'once':'onces'; if(n==='gousse'||n==='gousses') return singular?'gousse':'gousses'; if(n==='branche'||n==='branches') return singular?'branche':'branches'; if(n==='feuille'||n==='feuilles') return singular?'feuille':'feuilles'; if(n==='boite'||n==='boites') return singular?'boîte':'boîtes'; if(n==='conserve'||n==='conserves') return singular?'conserve':'conserves'; if(n==='tranche'||n==='tranches') return singular?'tranche':'tranches'; if(n==='paquet'||n==='paquets') return singular?'paquet':'paquets'; if(n==='bloc'||n==='blocs') return singular?'bloc':'blocs'; return displayUnit(raw);};const pluralizeToken=(token)=>{const core=token.replace(/^[^\p{L}]*/u,'').replace(/[^\p{L}]*$/u,''); if(!core) return token; const n=normalize(core); if(!n||['de','du','des','et','ou','en','a','au','aux','avec','sans','pour','sur','sous'].includes(n)||/ment$/.test(n)||/[sxz]$/.test(n)) return token; let plural=core; if(/al$/.test(n)) plural=core.replace(/al$/i,'aux'); else if(/(eau|au|eu)$/.test(n)) plural=core+'x'; else plural=core+'s'; return token.replace(core, plural);};const displayCountName=(name,unit)=>{const raw=String(name||'').trim(); if(!raw||!isTextualCountDisplayUnit(unit)) return raw; const unitNorm=normalize(unit); const stripped=raw.replace(new RegExp(`^(${unitNorm}|${unitNorm}s?)\\s+(de\\s+|d['’])?`,'i'),'').trim(); const lowered=lowercaseInitial(stripped||raw); if(/^(de|du|des|d['’])\b/i.test(lowered)) return lowered; if(/^[aeiouyhàâäéèêëîïôöùûü]/i.test(lowered)) return `d'${lowered}`; return `de ${lowered}`;};const displayName=(name,qty,unit)=>{const raw=String(name||'').trim(); if(!raw) return raw; if(!isCountUnit(unit)) return displayCountName(raw, unit); const q=Number(qty); if(!Number.isFinite(q)||Math.abs(q-1)<1e-9) return lowercaseInitial(raw); const parts=raw.split(/\s+/); const out=[]; let skipNext=false; for(const token of parts){const tokenNorm=normalize(token); const prefixNorm=normalize(token.replace(/[’'].*/,'')); if(skipNext){out.push(token); skipNext=false; continue;} if(['de','du','des'].includes(tokenNorm)){out.push(token); skipNext=true; continue;} if(['d','l'].includes(prefixNorm)){out.push(token); continue;} out.push(pluralizeToken(token));} return lowercaseInitial(out.join(' '));};const massFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'g':1,'gramme':1,'grammes':1,'gram':1,'grams':1,'kg':1000,'kilogramme':1000,'kilogrammes':1000,'lb':453.59237,'lbs':453.59237,'oz':28.34952,'once':28.34952,'onces':28.34952}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const volumeFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'ml':1,'millilitre':1,'millilitres':1,'l':1000,'litre':1000,'litres':1000,'t':250,'tasse':250,'tasses':250,'c a soupe':15,'cuillere a soupe':15,'cuilleres a soupe':15,'c a table':15,'c s':15,'c.s.':15,'c a the':5,'cuillere a the':5,'cuilleres a the':5,'c t':5,'c.t.':5}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const chooseKitchenDisplay=(volumeMl)=>{if(!Number.isFinite(volumeMl)) return {qty:NaN,unit:'c. à thé'}; const cups=volumeMl/250; const cupFractions=[0.25,1/3,0.5,2/3,0.75,1,1.25,1.5,1.75,2,2.5,3,4]; const nearCup=cupFractions.find(v=>Math.abs(cups-v)<0.045); const tbsp=volumeMl/15; if((Number.isFinite(nearCup)&&nearCup>=0.25)||tbsp>=3.75) return {qty:Number.isFinite(nearCup)?nearCup:cups,unit:'tasse'}; if(tbsp>=0.75) return {qty:tbsp,unit:'c. à soupe'}; return {qty:volumeMl/5,unit:'c. à thé'};};const formatMeasure=(qty,unit)=>{if(unit==='tasse'){const frac=formatFraction(qty); if(frac){return {qtyLabel:frac,unitLabel:qty<1?'de tasse':pluralizeMeasureUnit(unit,qty)};}} return {qtyLabel:format(qty),unitLabel:pluralizeMeasureUnit(unit,qty)};};const chooseImperialMassUnit=(massG,explicit)=>{const e=normalize(explicit); if(e==='once'||e==='onces'||e==='oz') return 'onces'; if(e==='lb'||e==='lbs') return 'lbs'; if(!Number.isFinite(massG)) return 'lbs'; return massG<453.59237?'onces':'lbs';};const setDerived=(qNode,isDerived)=>{if(qNode) qNode.classList.toggle('ingredient-approx',!!isDerived);};const updateIngredientForMode=(li,ratio)=>{const qNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-qte'); const uNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-uni'); const nNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-nom'); if(!qNode) return false; const defaultQty=parseFloat(li.dataset.defaultQty||''); const defaultUnit=li.dataset.defaultUnit||''; const baseName=li.dataset.baseIngredientName||li.dataset.ingredientName||''; const baseMass=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseMassG||''); const baseVolume=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseVolumeMl||''); const explicitUnitMass=li.dataset.explicitUnitMass||'g'; const massSource=li.dataset.massSource||'none'; const volumeSource=li.dataset.volumeSource||'none'; let qty=NaN; let unit=defaultUnit; let derived=false; if(mode==='mass'&&Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?chooseImperialMassUnit(baseMass*ratio,explicitUnitMass):'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=massSource==='derived';} else if(mode==='volume'&&Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){if(volumeUnitMode==='ml'){unit='ml'; qty=baseVolume*ratio;} else {const display=chooseKitchenDisplay(baseVolume*ratio); unit=display.unit; qty=display.qty;} derived=volumeSource==='derived';} else if(Number.isFinite(defaultQty)){qty=defaultQty*ratio; unit=defaultUnit; derived=false;} else {li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated'); return false;} const measure=formatMeasure(qty,unit); qNode.textContent=measure.qtyLabel; if(uNode){uNode.textContent=measure.unitLabel;} if(nNode){nNode.textContent=displayName(baseName, qty, unit);} li.setAttribute('data-ingredient-unit', measure.unitLabel); li.setAttribute('data-ingredient-name', displayName(baseName, qty, unit)); li.setAttribute('data-live-updated','1'); setDerived(qNode,derived); return true;};const applyModeButtons=()=>{if(btnDefault) btnDefault.classList.toggle('active', mode==='default'); if(btnVolume) btnVolume.classList.toggle('active', mode==='volume'); if(btnMass) btnMass.classList.toggle('active', mode==='mass'); if(btnVolKitchen) btnVolKitchen.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='kitchen'); if(btnVolMl) btnVolMl.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='ml'); if(btnMassG) btnMassG.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='g'); if(btnMassLbs) btnMassLbs.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='lbs'); const isVolume=mode==='volume'; const isMass=mode==='mass'; if(volumeSubmodes){volumeSubmodes.classList.toggle('recipe-measure-group-hidden', !isVolume); volumeSubmodes.querySelectorAll('button').forEach((btn)=>{btn.disabled=!isVolume;});} if(massSubmodes){massSubmodes.classList.toggle('recipe-measure-group-hidden', !isMass); massSubmodes.querySelectorAll('button').forEach((btn)=>{btn.disabled=!isMass;});} if(measureHelp){measureHelp.textContent=isVolume?'Les fractions de tasse sont privilégiées pour les grands volumes.':(isMass?'Choisissez entre grammes et livres selon votre préférence.':'Affiche les quantités telles qu’écrites dans la recette.');}};const update=()=>{const current=hasScaler?parseFloat(input.value):base;const ratio=(hasScaler&&Number.isFinite(current)&&current>0)?(current/base):1;document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-ingredient').forEach((li)=>{if(!updateIngredientForMode(li,ratio)){li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated');}});document.querySelectorAll('.ingredient-qte[data-base]').forEach((el)=>{if(el.closest('.recipe-ingredient[data-live-updated="1"]')) return;const b=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base'));if(Number.isFinite(b)){el.textContent=format(b*ratio);} });document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-total[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal*ratio;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-per-portion[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal/base;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});};if(input){input.addEventListener('input', update);} if(reset&&input){reset.addEventListener('click', ()=>{input.value=String(base); update();});}if(btnDefault){btnDefault.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='default'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'default'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolume){btnVolume.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='volume'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'volume'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMass){btnMass.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='mass'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'mass'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolKitchen){btnVolKitchen.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='kitchen'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'kitchen'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolMl){btnVolMl.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='ml'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'ml'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassG){btnMassG.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='g'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'g'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassLbs){btnMassLbs.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='lbs'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'lbs'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}applyModeButtons();update();})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id="recipe-timer-dock" class="recipe-timer-dock d-none"><strong>Minuteur</strong> <span id="recipe-timer-label"></span> <span id="recipe-timer-remaining"></span> <button id="recipe-timer-stop" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light" type="button">Arrêter</button></div>
<script>(function(){
let timer=null, target=0, audioCtx=null, alarmInterval=null, alarmTimeout=null;
const pad=(n)=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');
const fmt=(s)=>{const h=Math.floor(s/3600), m=Math.floor((s%3600)/60), sec=s%60; return h>0?`${h}:${pad(m)}:${pad(sec)}`:`${m}:${pad(sec)}`;};
const ensureAudio=async()=>{const Ctx=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext; if(!Ctx) return null; if(!audioCtx) audioCtx=new Ctx(); if(audioCtx.state==='suspended'){try{await audioCtx.resume();}catch(e){}} return audioCtx;};
const stopAlarm=()=>{if(alarmInterval){clearInterval(alarmInterval); alarmInterval=null;} if(alarmTimeout){clearTimeout(alarmTimeout); alarmTimeout=null;}};
const playBeep=(ctx,freq)=>{const t=ctx.currentTime+0.01; const osc=ctx.createOscillator(); const gain=ctx.createGain(); osc.type='sawtooth'; osc.frequency.value=freq; gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001,t); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.42,t+0.015); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.19); osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination); osc.start(t); osc.stop(t+0.2);};
const startAlarm=async()=>{const ctx=await ensureAudio(); if(!ctx) return; stopAlarm(); const notes=[1760,1480,2093,1760,2349,1760]; let i=0; const ring=()=>{playBeep(ctx,notes[i%notes.length]); i+=1;}; ring(); alarmInterval=setInterval(ring,250); alarmTimeout=setTimeout(stopAlarm,15000);};
const dock=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-dock'); const rem=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-remaining'); const lab=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-label'); const stop=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-stop');
const hide=()=>{if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} stopAlarm(); if(dock) dock.classList.add('d-none');};
document.addEventListener('click',async(e)=>{const b=e.target.closest('.recipe-timer-btn'); if(!b) return; const secs=parseInt(b.dataset.seconds||'0',10); if(!secs||secs<1) return; await ensureAudio(); stopAlarm(); if(timer) clearInterval(timer); target=Date.now()+secs*1000; if(lab) lab.textContent=b.textContent.replace('⏱️','').trim(); if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); timer=setInterval(()=>{const left=Math.max(0, Math.round((target-Date.now())/1000)); if(rem) rem.textContent=fmt(left); if(left<=0){if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} if(rem) rem.textContent='Terminé!'; if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); startAlarm();}},250);});
if(stop) stop.addEventListener('click', hide);
})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const pageKey='recipe_check_state:'+window.location.pathname;
const save=()=>{const state={}; document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{state[i]=cb.checked?1:0;}); localStorage.setItem(pageKey, JSON.stringify(state));};
const load=()=>{try{const s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(pageKey)||'{}'); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{cb.checked=!!s[i];});}catch(e){}};
const reset=()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.checked=false); save();};
const textFromLi=(li)=>{const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); return label?label.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():li.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();};
const copyGroceries=async()=>{const items=[...document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-grocery-list .recipe-ingredient')].filter(li=>!(li.querySelector('.recipe-ingredient-check')||{}).checked).map(textFromLi).filter(Boolean); const txt=items.length?items.map(x=>'- '+x).join('\n'):'(Aucun ingrédient restant)'; const fb=document.getElementById('grocery-copy-feedback'); try{if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){await navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt);} else {window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt);} if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste copiée.';}catch(e){window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt); if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste prête à copier.';}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{load(); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.addEventListener('change',save)); const c=document.getElementById('copy-grocery-list'); if(c) c.addEventListener('click',copyGroceries); const r=document.getElementById('reset-recipe-checks'); if(r) r.addEventListener('click',reset);});
})();</script>
```

## Notes

_★★★★½ (moyenne 4.6/5) · 9 commentaire(s) · Alexandre Parent: 0 · Élodie Bourgeois: 0_

- [Isabelle Laramee · 2019-09-22] Intéressé
- [★★★★½ · Micheline · 2019-09-24] Très bonnes recettes
- [Carmelle Cantin · 2020-09-13] J’ai déjà votre livre sur la mijoteuse. Je l’aime beaucoup
- [★★★★★ · Stéphane · 2020-10-01] Excellent. J’avais pas de rutabagas alors j’ai mis un gros radis blanc japonais couper en rondelle de 1/2 pouce environ et des panais aussi. Super recettes les enfant en ont redemander!
- [★★★★½ · Martial Huguette · 2020-10-25] Très bonnes recettes, merci.
- [★★★★½ · Marjorie · 2021-12-14] Très bonne recette !!
- [★★★★½ · Rose · 2022-02-01] Très bonne recette…merci
- [★★★★½ · Diane · 2022-10-10] Merci j’ai essayé et ses très bon souper vite faite encore un gros merci
- [serge boucher · 2022-10-18] je vais faire la resette elle a l air très bonne
